name: Swedish (Finland-Swedish)

ancestors.notes: Finnish adstrate: no tonal accent; long consonant quantity

notes: Finland-Swedish (finlandssvenska). Spoken by ~5% of Finns. NO TONAL ACCENT (Finnish influence — Finnish has no pitch accent). NO RETROFLEXION (alveolar r always; no ɳ ɖ ʈ ʂ clusters). sj-sound = [ʃ] or [sk] (not the mainland [ɧ]). Long consonant quantity very prominent (Finnish substrate). Source: Elert (1994).
